footer.regaLicensed: Saudi Real Estate General Authority Licensed

about.title: About Eawlma
about.subtitle: Eawlma is the trusted real-estate marketplace of the Kingdom — connecting buyers, renters, and verified agents across Saudi Arabia with a faster, cleaner, and more transparent property experience.
about.missionBody: We're building the most trusted property platform in Saudi Arabia by combining local expertise with a thoughtful product. Every listing is reviewed for accuracy, every agent is verified, and every conversation between a buyer and an agent happens in a secure, auditable channel.
about.kingdomBody: From Riyadh's Olaya district to Jeddah's Corniche and Dammam's waterfront, Eawlma indexes properties across Saudi Arabia's growing cities. The platform is fully bilingual, RTL-first, and respects PDPL data-protection requirements by design.
about.teamBody: A small Riyadh-based team of engineers, designers, and real-estate professionals. We're hiring across product, engineering, and customer success.
about.appDescription: Eawlma is a real estate platform connecting buyers and renters with trusted agents across Saudi Arabia. Discover your perfect property, book a short stay, and chat directly with agents.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Our team responds within 24 hours. For urgent listing or account questions, WhatsApp is the fastest channel.
contact.name: Your name
contact.sentSuccess: Thanks! Our team will respond within 24 hours.

settings.verificationDescription: Verify with Saudi national ID or Iqama via Authentica.sa to earn the gold verified badge on your public profile. Listings from verified agents convert significantly better.

settings.otpComing: You'll receive an OTP shortly to complete verification.
settings.pushPermissionDenied: Notifications are disabled for this app. Open Settings to enable them.

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Quick answers to common questions about Eawlma — for buyers, agents, and everyone in between.
help.noResultsBody: Try a different keyword, or reach out to our team directly.

faqs.q1: How do I search for a property?
faqs.a1: Tap the Search tab at the bottom, then pick filters that suit you (price, type, city).
faqs.q2: How do I contact an agent?
faqs.a2: Open the listing, then tap "Send Inquiry" or use the call/WhatsApp buttons on the agent card.
faqs.q3: Can I book chalets and farms?
faqs.a3: Yes — open any chalet / farm / rest-house listing and tap "Book Now" to pick dates.
faqs.q4: How do I save a property for later?
faqs.a4: Tap the heart icon on the listing. Saved items live under the Saved tab.
faqs.a5: Yes — free for property seekers. Agents pay a commission only after a successful deal.
faqs.q6: How do I change the app language?
faqs.a6: Profile tab → Settings → Language. Pick from 38 supported languages.
